headline: AT&T unveils $90 all-in wireless and internet subscription model
summary: New OneConnect plan bundles mobile, gigabit internet, and devices into single pricing as competition intensifies.

headline: What T-Mobile US (TMUS)'s New Fees and Partnerships Reveal About Its Evolving Investment Story
summary: T-Mobile US recently implemented new customer fees, including higher restocking charges and a US$35 Device Connection Charge for Apple purchases, while also announcing board changes, dividend plans, education and security partnerships, and continued community grant funding. These moves highlight T-Mobile’s effort to balance new revenue sources and ecosystem partnerships against the risk of higher churn in a crowded wireless market. We’ll now assess how T-Mobile’s latest fee increases,...

headline: T-Mobile quietly makes abrupt move as customer losses mount
summary: T-Mobile lost more of its loyal wireless customers in 2025 than the year before, putting pressure on the carrier to act. Amid elevated customer losses, the company is reshaping its operations as it fights to keep customers from switching. In November last year, Srini Gopalan became T-Mobile’s new ...

headline: XLC Is Down 8.78% Year to Date and the Catalysts That Matter Most Are Still Ahead
summary: Communication Services Select Sector SPDR Fund (NYSEARCA:XLC) is down 8.78% year to date, and the two stocks most responsible for that slide are the ones you need to watch most closely over the next 12 months. XLC tracks the communication services sector of the S&P 500, covering digital advertising, streaming, social media, and telecom. The ...
